programme.title: Custom Car Factory
programme.desc: Mechanics Kuba and Artur intend to renovate machines from World War II.The workshop participants will include: 'Kubusia', an armored car from the Warsaw Uprising, and a DKW NZ 250 motorcycle.

programme.title: Custom Car Factory
programme.desc: Mechanics Kuba and Artur intend to renovate machines from World War II.The workshop participants will include: 'Kubusia', an armored car from the Warsaw Uprising, and a DKW NZ 250 motorcycle.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big!
programme.sub-title: Oil platform in the Gulf of Mexico
programme.desc: The award-winning British presenter Richard Hammond discovers the secrets of the world's largest structures and machines.The host will explore the secrets hidden by the most famous megastructures.He will learn what makes gigantic buildings resistant to sudden weather changes and unfavorable climatic phenomena.He will also talk to the people responsible for creating the most amazing projects of the 21st century.Together with Hammond we will see, among others:the longest subway tunnel and a cargo ship the size of four football fields.The instructor will not stop at mere observation and will personally test each of the discussed structures.Through a series of interesting and amazing experiments, he will also deepen our scientific knowledge, proving that small things often have great possibilities.

programme.title: Steel Buddies
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 13
programme.desc: A program for classic car lovers.In each episode, Mike Brewer and Edd China struggle to restore a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to buy, renovate and sell a used car at a profit.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 13
programme.desc: A program for classic car lovers.In each episode, Mike Brewer and Edd China struggle to restore a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to buy, renovate and sell a used car at a profit.

programme.title: Asphalt Cowboys
programme.desc: The life of a truck driver who is always on the road, always under pressure from customers and spending a lot of time away from their families.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters 7
programme.desc: Pete Nelson builds treehouses for all those who want close contact with nature.He can create real apartments: with electricity, running water and sewage.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: Motoring enthusiasts invite you to the workshop.They deal with car repairs, renovations and tuning.Their skills and experience are equal to men.They will take on even the most difficult project.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: Motoring enthusiasts invite you to the workshop.They deal with car repairs, renovations and tuning.Their skills and experience are equal to men.They will take on even the most difficult project.

programme.title: Steel Buddies
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Steel Buddies
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Steel Buddies
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Steel Buddies
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Steel Buddies
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: Steel Buddies
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programme.title: You will be pleased 2
programme.desc: The authors of the program visit workshops with a hidden camera to observe the work of mechanics.The leader will evaluate their actions.

programme.title: You will be pleased 2
programme.desc: The authors of the program visit workshops with a hidden camera to observe the work of mechanics.The leader will evaluate their actions.

programme.title: Sydney Harbour
programme.desc: Port Jackson Bay is the busiest transportation center in the world.A television crew observes the most interesting events that take place there.

programme.title: Steel Buddies 4
programme.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast of a long list of excellent projects.

programme.title: Dual Survival 6
programme.desc: Two survival experts, a former commando and a master of a traditional survival school, test their skills in the most hostile corners of the world.

programme.title: Dual Survival Brazil
programme.desc: Two participants take on the challenge in the most difficult terrain in Latin America.They want to prove that skills and innovative approaches can ensure survival in extreme conditions.

programme.title: Sin City Tow
programme.desc: Tow truck drivers are on the hunt for cars that have been illegally parked in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Classic Car Rescue Germany
programme.desc: Chris and Max work every day at the Kubicki Motors workshop.The gentlemen are specialists in finding and restoring classic cars and youngtimers.

programme.title: Classic Car Rescue Germany
programme.desc: Chris and Max work every day at the Kubicki Motors workshop.The gentlemen are specialists in finding and restoring classic cars and youngtimers.

programme.title: Full Pull
programme.desc: The creators of the program will go to Germany, where huge tractors and their owners rule.These tractors are not used for field work and have little in common with agricultural machinery.These are monstrous vehicles weighing up to 4,500 kilograms, often powered by several twelve-cylinder aircraft or turboprop engines, with wheels as tall as a person.In the following episodes, viewers will meet people who are passionate about tractor pulling competition (a tractor with a trailer connected to it, which has... skids instead of wheels).On weekends, enthusiasts of this unique motor sport meet for competitions in various cities.

programme.title: Mighty Truckers
programme.desc: The series tells the story of representatives of not the easiest profession - drivers of large-size vehicles.It involves long working hours, frequent fatigue, huge loads, and busy roads.These are just selected obstacles that truckers struggle with every day.However, they do not complain.On the contrary, they love their job and would not change it for any other.Now they will tell themselves where the passion for covering subsequent sections of European roads comes from: in Germany, Italy and the Netherlands.

programme.title: Mighty Truckers
programme.desc: The series tells the story of representatives of not the easiest profession - drivers of large-size vehicles.It involves long working hours, frequent fatigue, huge loads, and busy roads.These are just selected obstacles that truckers struggle with every day.However, they do not complain.On the contrary, they love their job and would not change it for any other.Now they will tell themselves where the passion for covering subsequent sections of European roads comes from: in Germany, Italy and the Netherlands.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers 12
programme.desc: Mike Brewer and Edd China take the biggest risk of their professional careers and open a store on the West Coast.There is particularly strong competition in their industry.
